01 — Profile

Digital leader.
Built for scale.

Sixteen years of building systems, leading teams, and architecting communications that move nations — not just needles.

Currently steering digital strategy for national ministries at Avian WE, managing a monthly mandate of ~INR 85 Lakhs and a cross-functional team of 80. The work spans MIB, MEA, MoPSW, and NHAI — generating 10.8 billion annual impressions.

Former P&L owner at popkorn with 19% revenue growth, and founder of MRKTNG Labs India. Known for launching AI-enabled workflows that improve team productivity by up to 28%. The track record is consistent: come in, raise the ceiling, leave the infrastructure better than it was found.
